name: Sow Good Inc.
business: Sow Good Inc. is a U.S.-based consumer packaged goods company that pioneered the freeze dried candy category. It offers freeze dried candy and snack products that are marketed under a 'hyper dried, hyper crunchy, hyper flavorful' brand positioning. As of December 31, 2025, the company has transitioned to a capital-light model and operates as a commission-based distribution agent under an exclusive Distribution Agreement with Trea Grove, LLC.
sellsTo: retail and traditional wholesale distribution channels

exposures.sentence: Sow Good Inc. is a U.S.-based consumer packaged goods company that pioneered the freeze dried candy category.
Sow Good offers freeze dried candy and snack products.

catalysts.event: Sale of second tranche of Series AAA Preferred Stock
catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to the Securities Purchase Agreement, the Company expects to consummate the sale of the second tranche with the issuance of 1,500,000 shares of Series AAA Preferred Stock for additional proceeds of $3,000,000 in March 2026.

catalysts.event: Exit of industrial lease at 4024 Rock Quarry Road, Dallas, Texas
catalysts.sentence: Effective September 30, 2025, the Company agreed with Pinnacle to exit the facility on January 31, 2026.
The Distribution Agreement has a term through July 31, 2026.
